text.title: DR Drill Scenario Library Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: build-scenario-inventory
step.action: Enumerate >=6 scenarios across the categories. Pick declaration criteria + restore validation per scenario.

step.name: author-runbooks
step.action: Write one runbook per scenario. Include detect → declare → run → restore → validate → close.
step.note: Gate: If any runbook lacks restore validation, STOP — fix before scheduling.

step.name: publish-rotation-calendar
step.action: Schedule one scenario per quarter on a published calendar. Avoid repeats.

step.name: run-drill-with-post-mortem
step.action: Run drill. Capture timing, gaps, deviations. Within 7d publish post-mortem + gap tickets.

step.name: library-review-yearly
step.action: Yearly review: add scenarios, retire stale, recalibrate success criteria.
